'''âd-l-j''' ('''dalaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charcoal|charcoal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charcoal|charcoal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-l-j
|-
! Lemma
| dalaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dalajithi|dalajithi]] || [[word:dalajiji|dalajiji]] || [[word:dalajishi|dalajishi]] || [[word:dalaji|dalaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dalajuthuth|dalajuthuth]] || [[word:dalajujuj|dalajujuj]] || [[word:dalajushush|dalajushush]] || [[word:dalaj|dalaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dalajuthu|dalajuthu]] || [[word:dalajuju|dalajuju]] || [[word:dalajushu|dalajushu]] || [[word:dalaju|dalaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalajufuth|dalajufuth]] || [[word:dalajufuj|dalajufuj]] || [[word:dalajufush|dalajufush]] || [[word:dalajuf|dalajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dalajethe|dalajethe]] || [[word:dalajeje|dalajeje]] || [[word:dalajeshe|dalajeshe]] || [[word:dalaje|dalaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dalajothoth|dalajothoth]] || [[word:dalajojoj|dalajojoj]] || [[word:dalajoshosh|dalajoshosh]] || [[word:dalaj|dalaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dalajotho|dalajotho]] || [[word:dalajojo|dalajojo]] || [[word:dalajosho|dalajosho]] || [[word:dalajo|dalajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalajofoth|dalajofoth]] || [[word:dalajofoj|dalajofoj]] || [[word:dalajofosh|dalajofosh]] || [[word:dalajof|dalajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dalajĂŠthĂŠ|dalajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dalajĂŠjĂŠ|dalajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dalajĂŠshĂŠ|dalajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dalajĂŠ|dalajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dalajathath|dalajathath]] || [[word:dalajajaj|dalajajaj]] || [[word:dalajashash|dalajashash]] || [[word:dalaj|dalaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dalajatha|dalajatha]] || [[word:dalajaja|dalajaja]] || [[word:dalajasha|dalajasha]] || [[word:dalaja|dalaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dalajafath|dalajafath]] || [[word:dalajafaj|dalajafaj]] || [[word:dalajafash|dalajafash]] || [[word:dalajaf|dalajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dalajasha|dalajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godalajasha|godalajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidalajasha|gokidalajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dalajnĂŒsha|dalajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godalajnknĂŒsha|godalajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidalajnĂŒsha|gokidalajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dalajshĂ«sha|dalajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godalajnkshĂ«sha|godalajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidalajshĂ«sha|gokidalajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dalajrosha|dalajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godalajnkrosha|godalajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidalajrosha|gokidalajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dalajmusha|dalajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godalajnkmusha|godalajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalajmusha|gokidalajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dalajsherasha|dalajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godalajnksherasha|godalajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidalajsherasha|gokidalajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dalajngasha|dalajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godalajnkngasha|godalajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidalajngasha|gokidalajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dalajyasha|dalajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godalajnkyasha|godalajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidalajyasha|gokidalajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dalajyamasha|dalajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godalajnkyamasha|godalajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidalajyamasha|gokidalajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dalajnĂŒshĂ«sha|dalajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godalajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godalajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidalajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidalajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dalajnĂŒrosha|dalajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godalajnknĂŒrosha|godalajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidalajnĂŒrosha|gokidalajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalajnĂŒmusha|dalajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godalajnknĂŒmusha|godalajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalajnĂŒmusha|gokidalajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dalajshĂ«nĂŒsha|dalajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godalajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godalajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidalajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidalajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dalajshĂ«rosha|dalajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godalajnkshĂ«rosha|godalajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidalajshĂ«rosha|gokidalajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalajshĂ«musha|dalajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godalajnkshĂ«musha|godalajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalajshĂ«musha|gokidalajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dalajronĂŒsha|dalajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godalajnkronĂŒsha|godalajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidalajronĂŒsha|gokidalajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dalajroshĂ«sha|dalajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godalajnkroshĂ«sha|godalajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidalajroshĂ«sha|gokidalajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dalajromusha|dalajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godalajnkromusha|godalajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidalajromusha|gokidalajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dalajmunĂŒsha|dalajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godalajnkmunĂŒsha|godalajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidalajmunĂŒsha|gokidalajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dalajmushĂ«sha|dalajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godalajnkmushĂ«sha|godalajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidalajmushĂ«sha|gokidalajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dalajmurosha|dalajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godalajnkmurosha|godalajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidalajmurosha|gokidalajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dalaj|dalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dĂŠlĂŠj|dĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodalaj|hodalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodĂŠlĂŠj|hodĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodalaj|hohodalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodĂŠlĂŠj|hohodĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdalaj|nĂŒdalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdĂŠlĂŠj|nĂŒdĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdalaj|nĂŒnĂŒdalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠlĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdalaj|nĂŻdalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdĂŠlĂŠj|nĂŻdĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdalaj|nĂŻnĂŻdalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠlĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludalaj|ludalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludĂŠlĂŠj|ludĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludalaj|luludalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludĂŠlĂŠj|luludĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidalaj|lidalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidĂŠlĂŠj|lidĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidalaj|lilidalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidĂŠlĂŠj|lilidĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodalaj|kodalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodĂŠlĂŠj|kodĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodalaj|kokodalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodĂŠlĂŠj|kokodĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedalaj|kedalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedĂŠlĂŠj|kedĂŠlĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedalaj|kekedalaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedĂŠlĂŠj|kekedĂŠlĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
